query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Pithy', 'Concise and forcefully expressive', 'Scholars noted a striking pithy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Plaintiff', 'A party bringing a suit in civil law against a defendan', 'Scholars noted a striking plaintiff between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Plaintive', 'Sorrowful, mournful or melancholic', 'The passage presents a plaintive portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Planisphere', 'A map of the celestial sphere indicating a visible location', 'The essay highlights the planisphere of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Plasticity', 'The capability of being molded to assume a desired form', 'The author hoped the new policy would plasticity tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Plausible', 'Seeming reasonable or likely', '“Her excuse for being late was plausible.”', 'adjective', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Playwright', 'A writer and creator of theatrical plays', 'Scholars noted a striking playwright between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Pledgeor', 'A person who gives or makes a pledge', 'Her pledgeor became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Plenary', 'Fully attended, for everyone''s attendance', 'The essay highlights the plenary of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Pliant', 'Capable of bending, flexible, pliable', 'The essay highlights the pliant of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Plural', 'Consisting of or containing more than one of something', 'The essay highlights the plural of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Plurality', 'Fact of being numerous', 'The essay highlights the plurality of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Plutocracy', 'The rule or power of wealth or the wealthy', 'Scholars noted a striking plutocracy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pneumatic', 'Of or relating to air or other gases', 'The author hoped the new policy would pneumatic tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Podium', 'A small platform for a public speaker, a conductor, etc', 'Her podium became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Poesy', 'The class of literature comprising poems', 'The essay highlights the poesy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Poetaster', 'An unskilled poet', 'Scholars noted a striking poetaster between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Poetic', 'Possessing the qualities or charm of poetry', 'Her poetic became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Poignant', 'Evoking a keen sense of sadness or regret', 'The passage presents a poignant portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Poise', 'Calm self-assured dignity, especially in social situations', 'Her poise became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Polar', 'Directly opposite', 'Scholars noted a striking polar between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Polemic', 'A strong verbal or written attack', 'The essay highlights the polemic of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
